summary: Refactor navigation around direction-locked strict OK pinches and cross-center Victory paging.
scope: Lock each strict OK pinch to vertical scrolling or horizontal browser navigation until release.
Map left-to-right cross-center pinches to Back and right-to-left pinches to Forward in supported browsers.
Move page-down and page-up actions to cross-center Victory gestures.
Reserve open palm as a status-only gesture and clear all direction state on lifecycle changes.
validation: swift test passed 18 tests covering direction locks, Back, Forward, Victory paging and open-palm inactivity
TypeScript typecheck and 32 Web regression tests passed
Release app build and strict codesign verification passed
Installed bundle reports version 0.7.0 build 10 and MediaPipe GPU reached ready state
notes: Browser Back and Forward remain restricted to Chrome, Safari, Edge and Quark.
macos-v0.6.0 remains the rollback point before this navigation refactor.
